use_cases: Profile or avatar images with organic blob shapes
Hero section decorative imagery with animated effects
Product showcase elements with unique visual treatment
Portfolio thumbnails with morphing blob animations
Landing page visual accents with organic motion
ai_summary: A React image component that displays images within a continuously morphing blob shape using CSS clip-path and embedded keyframe animations. The blob smoothly transitions between multiple organic shapes while also rotating slightly, creating an organic, living appearance for static images. Self-contained with all animation logic embedded within the component.
